prose:
Frontier orbital analysis of pyridine — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) with PySCF  (single-point; no re-optimization) on the supplied pyridine.xyz geometry, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. SCF converged in 10 cycles; no warnings were reported by the engine.  

Results (electronic energies, Koopmans approximation):  
• HOMO energy: ‑7.2525992 eV  
• LUMO energy: ‑1.112786 eV  
• HOMO–LUMO gap (LUMO – HOMO): 6.1398131 eV  

The calculation used the chemkit `frontier-orbitals` skill with the settings above. The run completed successfully (integrity check: trustworthy = true). No warnings were issued. Output files, including the live PySCF log and the full JSON result (recorded at /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp9n45fci9/live.json), are available for inspection to reproduce or audit the result.
